seoTitle: Upper Manilla vs Upper Myall — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Manilla and Upper Myall. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Manilla vs Upper Myall: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Manilla and Upper Myall.
heading: Upper Manilla vs Upper Myall — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Manilla, New South Wales and Upper Myall, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Myall has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Upper Manilla (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Manilla or Upper Myall safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Manilla has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Upper Myall scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Manilla scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Myall scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Manilla or Upper Myall?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Myall has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
